solutions.title: Solution (elizarov)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
{
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val n
=
readLine
()!!.
toInt
()
val a
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
.
withIndex
().
sortedBy
{
it
.
value
}
var
i
=
0
var
j
=
n
-
1
val answer
=
ArrayList
<
Int
>(
n
)
var
bc
=
0
while
(
i
<=
j
)
{
if
(
bc
>=
a
[
i
].
value
)
{
answer
+=
a
[
i
++].
index
                bc
=
1
}
else
{
answer
+=
a
[
j
--].
index
                bc
++
}
}
println
(
answer
.
joinToString
(
" "
)
{
(
it
+
1
).
toString
()
})
}
}
